channel.title: Blog on Cillian Berragan
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Cillian Berragan

item.title: Managing References in R Markdown and Rnoweb
item.description: When writing my dissertation I found it difficult to dynamically manage references to R packages that I had used along the way. For the main document refernces I use Zotero which makes managing these trivial, but for packages, it wasn’t quite a simple.

item.title: Scripting in Bash to Export pdfs to a Kindle
item.description: In an effort to convert two column pdfs to the Kindle format, I found that an accepted solution did not at present exist. Converting a single column pdf is simple enough, but with two columns most programs are unable to correctly order the text.
